channel.title: Numerology on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Numerology on yexca'Blog

item.title: Into Metaphysics: The Runtime Logic of Fate
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview

Fate is the macro trend; luck is the micro execution.

In my post Into NDE , I mentioned metaphysical explanations. Honestly, when I felt lost about my own future, I started looking into this “mysterious Eastern power”—commonly known as fortune-telling.

I’ll keep this brief because the subject is deep, and since I’ve mostly just calculated my own chart, I’m not exactly an expert.

item.title: Into the NDE: Debugging the Afterlife
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by Gemini-3-pro

Consciousness: Containerized. Intuition: Overclocked. Observation: Write-Access to Reality.

NDE (Near-Death Experience) is basically what happens when your system uptime hits 99.9% and then suddenly crashes, only to reboot with unexpected admin privileges. Organizations like IANDS and researchers like Dr. P.M.H. Atwater have logged thousands of tickets (case studies) on this.

This article is based on that research plus my own “code review.” The subject is complex, so expect some unhandled exceptions.
